items.check: ma_vt = '*' or ma_vt = '{$%c[ma_vt]}' or (0 = (select top 1 nhieu_dvt from dmvt where ma_vt = '{$%c[ma_vt]}'))

command.text:
declare @cookie varchar(32), @item varchar(33) select @cookie = convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121), @item = ma_vt from dmgia3 where stt_rec = @stt_rec
if exists (select 1 from dmqddvt where ma_vt = @item) select @cookie as cookie else select @cookie as cookie, (select ten_dvt%l from dmdvt where dvt = (select dvt from dmvt where ma_vt = @item)) as ten_dvt%l return

declare @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Giấy báo giá đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

declare @wsID varchar(1) select @wsID = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_ws_id' create table #idNumber (stt_rec varchar(32)) insert into #idNumber exec FastBusiness$App$GetIdentityNumber @wsID, @@id, @@table, @@userID select @stt_rec = stt_rec from #idNumber drop table #idNumber
select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
if not exists(select 1 from dmgia3 where stt_rec = $stt_rec.OldValue and convert(varchar(19), datetime2, 121) = @$cookie) begin select @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where 1 = 1 and stt_rec = @stt_rec

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) select rtrim(a.dvt) as dvt, case when @@language = 'V' then b.ten_dvt else b.ten_dvt2 end as ten_dvt, a.nhieu_dvt from dmvt a join dmdvt b on a.dvt = b.dvt where a.ma_vt = @ma_vt else select '' as dvt, '' as ten_vt, 0 as nhieu_dvt, '' as ten_dvt return

if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) select a.nhieu_dvt, b.he_so from dmvt a left join vdmvtqddvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where a.ma_vt = @ma_vt and b.dvt = @dvt else select 0 as nhieu_dvt, 0 as he_so return
